phase.name: Foundation + Title Screen
phase.goal: Vite+TS+Kaplay scaffold, core data models (entities, items, spells, runes, rooms, floors), title screen with New Game / Continue, event-driven rendering architecture
phase.gates: G1 partial, G3 partial, R-v5.09, R-v5.21

phase.name: Dungeon Navigation + Map
phase.goal: Floor/room data for 2 authored floors (5-8 rooms each), visual map with room types, player position, click-to-navigate, room transitions, HUD with HP/mana/floor
phase.gates: G1 (room transitions), G3 (map + UI), R-v5.12, R-v5.17

phase.name: Auto-Resolve Combat + Traits
phase.goal: Unicorn Overlord style auto-combat with loadout, action policies, combat log, pause to adjust. Trait system with numeric values, trait shifts from combat. Visual player vs enemy.
phase.gates: G1 (combat resolution), G4 (pressure), R-v5.13, R-v5.14, R-v5.18

phase.name: Forge + Spell Crafting + Runes
phase.goal: Forge UI, rune discovery loop, spell crafting with 2+ ingredients, spells-as-ingredients, unique ingredients per spell, procedural naming, affinity by casting, affinity rewards

phase.name: Inventory, Equipment, Character Sheet, Skill Tree
phase.goal: Inventory grid, equippable items (weapon/armor/trinket/focus), character sheet with stats/traits/affinities, physical skill tree separate from spells, loadout slots

phase.name: NPCs, Merchants, Dialogue, Events
phase.goal: 3+ NPCs with branching dialogue, trait-reactive dialogue, merchants with buy/sell/trade, event rooms, rest rooms with actual rest action

phase.name: Pressure Mechanics + Boss Design + Game Clock
phase.goal: Floor bosses gating progression, encounters requiring crafted spells, resource pressure, enemy counterplay, build pressure from loadout limits, game clock

phase.name: Polish, Persistence, Build
phase.goal: localStorage save/load, transient UI feedback, icon sourcing pass, visual polish, production build
phase.gates: R-v5.09, R-v5.10, G3 final, production build
